title: Le tempore atmospheric
summary: Talk about the weather and seasons.

teach.note: pluver = to rain, an impersonal verb like English 'it rains'.

grammar.title: Weather verbs
grammar.body:
Weather uses the dummy subject **il**, like English "it": **il pluve** (it rains), **il nive** (it snows), **il face frigide** (it's cold — literally 'it makes cold').
Common weather adjectives: **calide** (hot), **frigide** (cold), **nubilose** (cloudy).

teach.target: In le estate il face calide, in le hiberno il face frigide.
teach.roman: in le estate il face calide in le hiberno il face frigide
teach.english: In summer it's hot, in winter it's cold.
teach.note: facer = to make/do; here used impersonally for weather.
